name: Embark Now: User Demand Oriented Framework for Multi-day Urban Travel Itinerary Planning

description: arXiv:2607.10651v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In large urban areas, planning multi-day travel itineraries is challenging due to the abundance of Points of Interest (POIs), diverse user preferences, and constraints such as opening hours. Effective solutions must dynamically accommodate diverse traveler requirements while optimizing for satisfaction and feasibility within limited computation ti...
author: Rongbo Qi, Yaqi Zhang, Shijun Yan, Xuemeng Liu, Xiangrui Cai, Chunyao Song
